meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching: Finish Your First AI App (Student Guide)
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to use freelance pitching to gain accountability, build your portfolio, and finish your first AI app with Antigravity.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of external stakes. By freelance pitching to real clients, you transform a hobby project into a professional obligation. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to rapidly build a Minimum Viable Product that solves a specific business problem, forcing you to reach the finish line.
content.intro:
Your GitHub is a graveyard of half-baked repos. You start with high-octane energy, but by the third week of API integration, the momentum dies, and the project joins the 'abandoned' pile. This isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of pressure. You aren't building for a user; you're building for yourself, and that makes it far too easy to quit.

Freelance pitching is the ultimate antidote to developer procrastination. When you have a client expecting a deliverable, the 'nice-to-have' features vanish, and the 'must-have' functionality takes center stage. By anchoring your learning in a real-world contract, you move from a student struggling with syntax to a builder delivering value. Let’s turn your unfinished code into a professional launch.

steps.title: Identify a Micro-Problem
steps.description: Find a local business or niche community with a repetitive manual task. Don't build a platform; build a tool that saves them 30 minutes a day.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following business workflow: [Insert Workflow]. Identify the top three repetitive tasks suitable for automation via a Python-based AI agent.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research common pain points for small business owners in the [Niche] sector.'

steps.title: Draft the Value Proposition Pitch
steps.description: Pitch the solution, not the code. Focus on the time saved and the ROI for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional outreach email for a freelance AI project. Focus on specific outcomes: cost reduction and time savings. Keep it under 150 words.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review this pitch draft and rewrite it to sound more authoritative and result-oriented.'

steps.title: Build the MVP Skeleton
steps.description: Use modern tooling to scaffold your project instantly so you don't get stuck in boilerplate setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular project structure for a FastAPI backend with an integrated OpenAI client for [Specific Task].

steps.title: Implement the 'Core Loop'
steps.description: Focus only on the primary function the client is paying for. Ignore UI polish until the logic works.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core logic for the AI agent to process [Input] and return [Output] using the latest OpenAI SDK patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement the core logic for the data processing pipeline as outlined in the project specs.'

steps.title: Ship and Iterate
steps.description: Deploy to a simple cloud provider and get it into the client's hands immediately for feedback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script for a Railway/Vercel environment that includes environment variable validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a deployment checklist and suggest the fastest way to get this code live for user testing.'

pro_tips: Never build more than 40% of the project before showing it to the client; feedback loops prevent feature creep.
Use 'Time-Boxing' to limit your coding sessions to 90 minutes; it prevents burnout on complex debugging.
Document your failures as 'Lessons Learned' in your portfolio—recruiters value problem-solving over perfect code.
Always ask for a 'Testimonial' upon delivery; it is more valuable than your first payment for your future career.
Treat your code as a 'Draft'; ship the MVP, gather data, and only then refactor for performance.
content.next_steps: Once you finish this project, document the entire process in a 'Case Study' format. Publish this on LinkedIn and your portfolio site to attract your next client.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop dreaming and start shipping. Don't let your code sit idle—turn your next project into a professional portfolio piece. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
